title: STAT+: Novo Nordisk strikes deal with U.S. startup to develop oral obesity, diabetes drugs
description: Novo Nordisk announced it had signed a deal with Vivtex, a biotech co-founded by MIT professor Robert Langer, to develop oral obesity and diabetes drugs.
content: Novo Nordisk announced it had signed a deal with Vivtex, a biotech co-founded by MIT professor Robert Langer, to develop oral obesity and diabetes drugs.
